title: H_008 SWAP-XOR-C VALIDATED: parity trap fixed, sample-efficiency curve, band k*=96 G-1.5a-C (seed 0, instrumented) on the corrected panel: C-dup in_sample=1.0 at k<=192 (control MEMORIZES вҖ” SWAP-XOR-B was stuck at 0.5, parity trap gone via A7') with a genuine sample-efficiency curve f2 0.5417(k24)->0.7448(k96)->0.9167(k192). Band candidate k*=96 (f2 0.74 in [0.60,0.80]). k=192 saturates; k=384 anomaly (in_sample 0.638 + higher ceA вҖ” full-budget optimization instability, single-seed, flagged). Corrected gate met (reachability by in-sample fit not held-out level). Convergence audit-wrong-property-parity-1 recorded (a closed-form audit testing the wrong property forced a parity-trap construction that passed all-green yet was unlearnable). Next: G-1.5b seed 1 cross-seed stability + resolve k=384 anomaly -> G-1.5c pricing -> freeze.

H_008 G-1.5a = K1-VOID-FOR-CAUSE: SWAP-XOR-B parity-trap defect (mis-specified A7) вҖ” rebuild SWAP-XOR-C lab-full adjudication (Fable decisive; Codex trace-only): C-dup at chance all budgets incl k=384 (0.5156) вҖ” opposite of H_007 saturation, so the band E-anchor was refuted and the gate is inadmissible (not a clean CLOSE). Verified root cause: build_swap_xor_b.py deviated from seed В§3.1 (48 distinct syllables/arbitrary class) to 24 paired syllables to pass A7-as-implemented (syllableвҶ’class 0.500, arithmetically incompatible with 48-distinct), making class a 2-syllable parity conjunction вҶ’ 3-way parity with gold, SGD-hard. Fix = SWAP-XOR-C (48 distinct non-corpus syllables, arbitrary per-lexeme class; A7' = no cross-lexeme syllable sharing + no CPT). Corrected gate: reachability by in-sample budget-fit d_acc(B(k))>=0.95 not held-out control level. Next: rebuild вҶ’ re-run G-0b вҶ’ G-1.5a instrumented. Campaign stays CONCLUDED until corrected pre-run.

H_008 G-1.5a: control at FLOOR not ceiling вҖ” K1-literal but under verdict-integrity review G-1.5a measured C-dup (forward control) f2_dacc on SWAP-XOR-B at chance for ALL budgets: k=24вҶ’0.5104, k=96вҶ’0.50, k=192вҶ’0.4948, k=384(full)вҶ’0.5156. The collector stamped K1 CLOSE (no budget in [0.60,0.80]) but the control is at the FLOOR, the OPPOSITE of the H_007 saturation the band guarded against. Likely cause: byte-orthogonal synthetic non-corpus pools (which closed H_007's class side channel) over-corrected into ungroundedness (Fable В§7 'ungrounded-for-all-arms' risk) вҖ” the from-scratch d=384 trunk cannot learn 24 arbitrary synthetic lexemeвҶ’class + compose. Per verdict-integrity, NOT stamping CLOSE: the band gate conflates 'reachable' with 'sub-ceiling' and cannot tell 'ungrounded for all arms' from 'hard for the forward control specifically' (which is the mechanism's whole premise). Delegated the adjudication to lab full (Fable+Codex): mis-framed gate vs genuine CLOSE + cheapest disambiguating measurement + panel fix (productive byte-length-preserving class cue?).

H_008 lit-verify + G-0b CLEARED вҖ” SWAP-XOR-B 16/16 audits pass, side channel closed build_swap_xor_b.py: 24 byte-orthogonal synthetic lexemes (rare Hangul, NSMC-absent) + coverage-complete drill n=384 (f2-subjectsвҠҶdrill) + f2 n=192 + nested budget constructor B(24/96/192/384). ALL 16 audits PASS: A1-A6 (H_007 suite re-run) + A7 class-byte-orthogonality 0.500 exact (closes the В§0.5 budget-independent side channel that voided H_007) + B1-B6 budget audits. First build failed B2/B3 (budget prefix all marker0/SOV вҶ’ gold unidentifiable); root-caused to the naive first-r-per-subject selector, fixed with class-local phase-rotated ordering so every budget prefix is cell-balanced. lit-verify: load-bearing premise carried-verified from H_007; 2 new MEMORY rows (Rasmus 2015 ladder, Power 2022 grokking) foundational/non-critical, arXiv rate-limited=infra. Freeze still blocked on G-1.5a/b/c band-existence controls-first pre-run (~1.5h ea).

[c] anima-v4 TERMINAL CAMPAIGN RESULT written вҖ” map fully disposed, mech-1 = the positive Fable campaign-synthesis absorbed + implemented: state/campaign_result_2026-07-17/CAMPAIGN_RESULT.md (prose, all numbers cited with arm+source, spot-verified against H_004 verdict.json) + ARCHITECTURE campaign-result node (terminal-finding/thesis-verdict/disposed-map/method-lessons/reopen-conditions, cells вүӨ700). Terminal finding: a hand-staged parse-disagreement FIELD injected write-side causes held-out compositional honorific binding beyond rank-1 (F1 О” 0.3789/0.3802, F4 offtop 0.6467/0.6963, F5 strip 1.0вҶ’0.5). Thesis verdict PARTIAL вҖ” write-side PLACEMENT proven (both v1 deaths escaped), self-organizing-tension unreached (H_005 K3 learned-values wall + H_006 inadmissible support). Map: mech-1 SEALED, mech-2/4 walled, mech-3/7 dead, mech-5 retired-inadmissible, mech-6 don't-open. Reopen: [b] supervision-budget new-H (G-1.5 band-existence gated) + scaled successor.

H_007 FROZEN + G-2 harness built, ~7h run launched All 3 $0 gates cleared вҶ’ card+registry pre_register_frozen:true (frozen_at 2026-07-17) with G-1 anchors (П„=0.05, E[A-tug d_acc]вүҲ0.57). Built train_g2.py (d=384 L=4, 2seedГ—5arm A-tug/C-dup/C-shuf/C-scaf/C-perm reusing the G-1 two-head machinery, + F4 role-code eff-rank probe and F5 project-out ablation with random-subspace/C-dup specificity controls) and collect_verdict_g2.py (frozen falsifier ladder: precondвҶ’harnessвҶ’F3вҶ’P-conflictвҶ’F1вҶ’F4вҶ’F5вҶ’F6 with the H_003 seed-spread INCONCLUSIVE rule). --tiny plumbing verified all 5 arms + F4/F5 + verdict collector end-to-end (correctly DEAD at chance). H_007 G-1 d=64 kill-only smoke = PROCEED-CANDIDATE (weak-positive) вҖ” 3/3 gates cleared train_g1_smoke.py trains a shared d=64 trunk with two byte-LM heads (head-A forward + head-G swap-target for A-tug / forward-dup for C-dup). NOT killed: (i) P-conflict role-specific, differential cos-grad vs C-dup +0.2716 (A-tug conflicted then resolves late; C-dup heads converge) вҖ” the absolute cos was confounded by the two separate readout heads (C-dup showed cos=A-tug at init), so the instrument was corrected to the differential vs C-dup; (ii) faithful f2 forced-choice d_acc A-tug 0.5677 > C-dup 0.4948, sep +0.0729. The subject-class probe (0.9655 both arms) is a free-ingredient diagnostic that falsely read KILL until repointed at the composition (H_005 phi-hon ceiling trap). HONEST CAVEAT: sep +0.073 is below the F1 bar 0.15 and single-seed at undertrained d=64 вҖ” direction right, gate cleared, promises nothing. All 3 freeze-blocking $0 gates now cleared (lit-verify + G-0 + G-1); next = pre_register_frozen then ~7h d=384x2seedx5arm G-2.

H_007 G-0 SWAP-XOR panel gate CLEARED (2/3 $0 gates) build_swap_xor.py builds the SWAP-XOR verdict panel (f2 n=192 OOD, f1 n=64 liveness) where gold=class(subject)вҠ•form(object-marker) with role read from a case marker under SOV/OSV scrambling. ALL 10 closed-form audits PASS: free-slot=[0], GF(2) codebook rank=2 (gold in neither ingredient alone), every single-site heuristic EXACTLY 0.500, length-parity, byte-aligned swap(x) transpose, and a structural supervision-leak ban (answer forms absent from head-G target). First build FAILED the heuristic audit (worst-byte 0.677 = finite-sample overfit) + held-out overlap; root-caused to random sampling and fixed with a deterministic-balanced construction (each lexeme balanced across the marker bit = exact decorrelation, H_004's orthogonal-array discipline). Second of 3 freeze-blocking gates cleared; next = G-1 d=64 kill-only smoke (P-conflict cos-grad<0 measured + probe separation vs C-dup).

H_007 lit-verify /bin/zsh gate CLEARED вҖ” contrarian premise verified sidecar research confirmed the load-bearing citation: PCGrad (Yu 2020, arXiv 2001.06782), GradNorm (Chen, 1711.02257), and Recon (2302.11289) all treat gradient conflict (cos<0) as a pathology to REMOVE вҖ” so mech-5's bet (the conflict is the forge that builds a recombinable role-code) is genuinely contrarian to the gradient-surgery literature, making both a green and a red informative. Caruana 1997 / SCAN / ELECTRA are foundational supporting priors (non-critical). First of H_007's 3 freeze-blocking $0 gates cleared; next = G-0 SWAP-XOR panel build + codebook audit, then G-1 d=64 kill-only smoke.

H_005 G3-a verdict: WIRING FAILURE (precond) + K3 вҶ’ consolidate at G-2 The learned-ПҮМӮ run (free-slot d=384 Г—2seed) returned WIRING FAILURE: A-ПҮМӮ fit its own drill unstably (1.0/0.832, s1<0.95) вҖ” a training-stability limit of the tiny learned bilinear g (wiring clean; A-hand on the same rig fit 1.0/1.0). Substantive signal needs no unstable seed: F1a passes (О” 0.298/0.191, F4/F5 clean) but F1aвҖІ FAILS both incl the fit seed s0 (A-ПҮМӮ 0.82/0.71 вүӘ A-hand 1.0, margin вҲ’0.18/вҲ’0.29) = Fable's K3 вҖ” the learned ПҮМӮ cannot reproduce the hand concord at this scale (honest-limit a, G3-0d probe=1.0). DECISION per K3 STOP: CONSOLIDATE AT G-2. H_004's FIELD-FORMAT claim (рҹҹў SUPPORTED) is the campaign's proven, defensible result; G3-a does not extend it; no re-run (fit-seed F1aвҖІ-fail excludes SUPPORTED). G3-b/H_006 (trained SUPPORT) remains the only untried lever but is strictly harder вҖ” needs a fresh research gate. Card+REGISTRY+SSOT updated.

H_005 G3-0d gate PASS (probe ПҶвҶ’hon=1.0) вҖ” buildable, honest-limit(a) scoped The G3-a admissibility gate ran on the real d=384 CPT trunk: logistic probe ПҶвҶ’hon held-out acc=1.0 (n=1200) вүҘ0.90 вҶ’ PASS, ПҮМӮ=g(ПҶ) can read concord, G3-a is buildable. But acc=1.0 hits honest-limit(a) at the ceiling: the templatic drill register lets the frozen trunk encode the hon bit near-verbatim, so g(ПҶ) is ~one linear unmix from g(raw hon); the eventual F1a-green claim is SCOPED to 'concord recoverable from trunk representations on the drill register' вҖ” a modest, honestly-bounded result (F5 still guards vacuity). Recorded on the card + SSOT node ng.mech1.g3a-h005. Also fixed card F6 inconsistency (G3-a has no C-plc; C-ПҮМӮplc IS the placebo). NEXT: F4/F5 for A-ПҮМӮ + collect_verdict_g3a вҶ’ H_005 freeze вҶ’ ~4h run.

H_005 pre-register SEED вҖ” G3-a learned ПҮМӮ (values half of the learned duel) After H_004 рҹҹў SUPPORTED + the G-3 research-gate, the next method-step (pre-register) is done: H_005 cards G3-a вҖ” can a LEARNED concord ПҮМӮ=g(ПҶбөў,ПҶвұј) on the FIXED proxy support reproduce the hand-computed field's causal power. Lever = ПҮ policy (hand ПҮ vs learned ПҮМӮ), support held fixed. Arms A-ПҮМӮ/A-hand/C-ПҮМӮplc/C-scaf/C-perm; primary F1a d_acc(A-ПҮМӮ)вҲ’d_acc(C-ПҮМӮplc)вүҘ0.15 both (headroom 0.32, 2Г— the bar); F1aвҖІ non-inferiority A-ПҮМӮвүҘA-handвҲ’0.05; F2-F6/harness carried from H_004 on free-slot d_acc. NOT frozen вҖ” $0 gate G3-0d (hon-bit trunk probe вүҘ0.9) + a d=64 smoke (device+injection+one-variable, per this session's 3-defect discipline) gate the freeze. Kill K2/K3 вҶ’ consolidate at H_004's FORMAT claim. H_004 stays sealed.

H_004 mech-1 нҢҢм„ңкІ°нҲ¬ вҶ’ рҹҹў SUPPORTED (first non-negative verdict) collect_verdict_h004.py on the free-slot d=384 Г—2seed Г—5arm run returns SUPPORTED: F1 О”(A-duelвҲ’A-rank1)=0.3789/0.3802 вүҘ0.15 both seeds, and critically the two measurements that killed anima(v1) both PASS вҖ” F4 offtop 0.6467/0.6963 вүҘ0.20 (R reads a HIGH-rank field, not L1's rank-1 one-bit seam) and F5 d_dacc 0.5/0.5 вүҘ0.05 (strip the resolution вҶ’ A-duel 1.0вҶ’0.5, so the decoder needs the resolved field, not L2's any-tensor capacity); F2/F3/F6/harness/precond all clean both seeds. The parse-tension FIELD FORMAT (edge-aligned, high-dimensional) causes held-out honorific binding beyond its rank-1 summary. SCOPE: ПҮ is hand-computed, so this certifies the FIELD FORMAT as causal carrier but does NOT yet claim a trained parser pair produces it вҖ” SUPPORTED licenses building the learned-duel stage next. Reached after 3 root-caused defects (device-placement В· CE-dilution В· GF(2)-rank-4 parity metric-ceiling). Card+REGISTRY+SSOT updated.

H_004 free-slot fit-check GO вҶ’ full run RE-LAUNCHED Free-slot fit-check PASSED all three bars: A-duel free drill 1.0/1.0 (bar1), ce_ans 0.0004 (bar2), C-perm free drill 0.4648вҲҲ[.40,.60] + held-out f2вҖі 0.4922вҲҲ[.45,.55] + parity slots 1.0/1.0 (bar3) вҶ’ GO. Per-slot [0.25,0.47,0.61,1.0,0.53,1.0] confirms Fable's parity diagnosis exactly (free slots chance, parity slots 1.0) and the leak is gone under free-slot scoring. Full run re-launched: d=384 Г—2seed Г—5arm, drill 4000, free-slot metric (~4h).

H_004 bar3 adjudicated: metric parity-ceiling defect вҶ’ free-slot re-registration Fable (btgczi488) + $0 reference-match on the codebook found the bar3 fail is NOT a surface leak but a metric-ceiling defect: the K=6 gold codebook is GF(2) rank-4 (slot3=s0вҠ•s1вҠ•s2, slot5=s1вҠ•s2вҠ•s4 on all codewords, drill+f2вҖі); teacher-forced scoring lets any answer-LM (incl. shuffled-gold C-perm) complete the 2 parity slots вҶ’ field-blind d_acc ceiling 0.667 reaching held-out. Per-slot log confirms C-perm=[0.25,0.5,0.59,1.0,0.5,1.0] (parity slots 1.0, free slots chance). A-duel F1 equally inflated вҶ’ mech-1 uninterpretable at registered thresholds вҖ” the run would have burned even had bar3 passed (H_001 admissibility recurrence). FIX (Fable option i, $0): dacc_panel scores only field-carried FREE slots {0,1,2,4} computed from the codebook; C-perm re-scores 0.643вҶ’0.465 (chance). bar3 corrected two-sided + held-out f2вҖі + parity confirmation. Free-slot fit-check running; full run held. Convergence build-honbind-multi-py-1.

H_004 bar3 probe: leak reaches held-out (d=64 confound) bar3_probe.py (d=64 discriminator) FLIPPED the benign prior: C-perm held-out f2вҖі=0.6615 (out of harness band [0.45,0.55]), A-duel held-out f2вҖі=1.0. The bar3 fail is NOT benign drill-memorization вҖ” the Г—65 answer up-weight makes the answer recoverable via a non-field (surface) channel that reaches the held-out panel. CONFOUND: probe is d=64 while run-1's clean C-perm (0.45/0.5) was d=384 under the diluted objective, so boosted-objective-leaks is not yet separated from d=64-over-exploits-surface. Missing decisive cell = C-perm f2вҖі at d=384 boosted. Fable-5 adjudicating; full 5-arm run held until the harness is clean.

H_004 fit-check: dilution fix CONFIRMED (bar1/2), bar3 harness NO-GO Fit-check (MPS d=64/L2, CPT 200 + drill 1500) confirmed the objective-dilution fix: A-duel drill d_acc 0.83/0.64 (run-1) вҶ’ 1.0/1.0 seed-stable, ce_ansвҶ’0.0004 (bar1+bar2 PASS). This validates the root cause was masked-CE dilution + under-optimization, not capacity (recorded as convergence train-h004-py-3). bar3 (C-perm on drill true-gold вүӨ0.60) FAILED at 0.6432 вҶ’ NO-GO, full run not launched. bar3 gates the harness arm on the drill (training-dist, memorizable) whereas the frozen harness gate measures C-perm on held-out f2вҖі (run-1=0.45/0.5, clean) вҖ” adjudication (genuine surface-leak reaching f2вҖі vs benign d=64 memorization) delegated to Fable-5.

H_004 objective amendment applied (drill CE dilution fix) Absorbed Fable-5 root-cause (btgczi488): run-1 precond failed because drill CE converged to 6В·ln2/233=0.0178 вҖ” masked CE over ~233 surface bytes drowned the 18 answer bytes so the objective could not distinguish binding-solved from chance. Applied 6 arm-blind fixes to train_h004.py (F1 thresholds/arms/panels frozen): two-term drill CE (ce_surf + 5.0В·ce_ans, Г—65 answer up-weight via new amask over predict-positions base-1..base+3K-2), drill LR warmup+cosine 3e-4вҶ’1e-5, grad-clip 1.0, per-step logging, drill_steps 2500вҶ’4000, and a --fit-check d=64 MPS pre-flight with a 3-part go-bar. CPU smoke GREEN (WIRING-4 A-duel overfits 16 items to d_acc=1.0, injection path intact after the objective change). Honest downside: if a properly-fitted A-duel still shows f2вҖі gap <0.05 vs A-rank1, that is mech-1 falsified, not an artifact.

H_004 G-2 run complete вҶ’ WIRING FAILURE (precond) The parser-duel falsification run finished (d=384, 5 arms Г— 2 seeds, ~3.5h MPS) but collect_verdict_h004.py returned WIRING FAILURE, not a mechanism verdict: the frozen admissibility precond drill d_acc(A-duel) вүҘ 0.95 failed (s0=0.8255, s1=0.6354). Quarantined per infra-wall-noneval + verdict-integrity вҖ” the model never fit its own K=6 drill, so no falsifier is admissible; this is a training/capacity wall, not mech-1's answer. Drill fit is above chance but seed-unstable (0.83вҶ”0.64), pointing at under-training over a capacity ceiling; prime suspect is the drill masking CE over all ~250 surface bytes rather than the 6 answer slots. Raw seed panel recorded (F1 О” seed0 +0.20 / seed1 вҲ’0.02, controls clean) but gated by the failed precond. Root-cause + minimal-fix design delegated to Fable-5; F1 thresholds/arms/panels stay frozen.

H_007 G-2 VERDICT (d=384 L=4, seed 0 decisive): F1 INADMISSIBLE-AS-RUN вҶ’ RETIRED вҖ” the compute-matched control SATURATES (C-dup f2_dacc 1.0000, A-tug 0.9896, О” вҲ’0.0104; F3 floor blown: C-scaf 0.8073 вүҘ 0.60). mech-5 = UNMEASURED-NOT-FALSIFIED (headroom 0 вҮ’ О”вүҲ0 forced under both worlds вҖ” not written as K2). Root cause code-confirmed: head-A directly supervised on the gold suffix in every arm + pairings-only holdout вҮ’ the forward route learns class-lookup + marker + XOR to ceiling unaided; G-1's +0.073 was an under-training artifact (C-dup 0.4948@d64 вҶ’ 1.0@d384) and the frozen anchor E[C-dup]=0.62 was inherited fiction (H_003/H_004 A-rank1 band). Rescue analysis (card): (a) answer-masking kills reachability (grounding channel = saturating channel), (b) every difficulty knob either ungrounds gold for ALL arms or reduces F1 to a fragile sample-efficiency claim (= a NEW H), (c) probe scoring collapses into F4 (measured: F4 passes BOTH arms, F5 О”_projF4 = 0.0 BOTH вҖ” probed role-code causally inert). Classified: SATURATION/MEASUREMENT wall (substrate too capable for the panel вҖ” opposite of H_005).
